lines.text: Bike Rentals | Walt Disney World Resort
Breeze along lakefront promenades and woodland trails at Walt Disney World Resort.
Show Safety, Accessibility and Guest Policies
Ride along tree-lined paths, through lush meadows, past tranquil canals and more. It’s bicycling bliss!
Both adult bikes and children’s bikes—some with training wheels—are available on a first-come, first-serve basis from the following Disney Resort hotel locations:
The Cabins at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort
The Campsites at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort
Please note that helmets and child seats are complimentary with all bike rentals.
Florida law requires bicyclists under 16 years of age to wear helmets, and Guests must remain within the specific Resort area where the bike has been rented.
Rent a 2-person, 4-person or 6-person Surrey bike for an outing that’s fun for the whole family!
